title: How do you learn best when introduce to new capabilities?

posts.author: Lior_Marketplace (Lior Reiner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,
Lior again from the apps marketplace team at monday.com

We always work to ensure you have all the tools and resources you need to fully understand what our marketplace apps do and how they can benefit you and we’d love to hear your preferences to provide the best resources tailored to your needs.

So my question for our community is, how do you prefer to learn how to use new apps?

  • Schedule a live demo - A dedicated one-on-one meeting to walk you through the app.
  • Watch a recorded demo - Accessible anytime for your convenience.
  • Get a complete “How-to” guide - A detailed guide showcasing every feature.
  • One-pager instructions - Quick installation and use instructions.
  • FAQs section - Answers to the most common questions about the app.
0 voters

Thank you so much for your insights! your feedback is invaluable and really helps us create the most useful tools and resources for our community.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Super interested to see how our community learns!
